form.formComment: Good performance to win by a nose at Richmond over 520m (30.33) beating Tap Out Kitty in Grade 5 on April 1. Form reads well for this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by a nose at Richmond over 520m (30.33) beating Tap Out Kitty in Grade 5 on April 1. Form reads well for this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the early stages of the first turn and lost momentum.
Began awkwardly and was slow to begin.

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 520m at Nowra in a handy 29.50 beating Angry Goliath. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 520m at Nowra in a handy 29.50 beating Angry Goliath. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

form.formComment: Comes off a (20.77) win last time, scoring by a neck in a Grade 5 over 365m at Nowra. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start by one length at Temora (25.91) beating Magical Gem in a Grade 5 on April 1. In form and is right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together on the first turn and fell.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 2 over 520m at this track behind Bandit Blaze beaten 3.5 lengths (30.01) in a Grade 5. Not among the main chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 2 over 520m at this track behind Bandit Blaze beaten 3.5 lengths (30.01) in a Grade 5. Not among the main chances this time.

form.formComment: Was edged out last time at Temora when beaten just a nose but did clock an exceptional 25.56 over the 457m journey. Harder here and one for the multiples.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was edged out last time at Temora when beaten just a nose but did clock an exceptional 25.56 over the 457m journey. Harder here and one for the multiples.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 520m in 29.70. Followed that up with a minor placing over 520m at this track at Grade 5 four days ago. Not suited by wide draw, prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on entering the first turn, stumbled and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 6 length third but did run a respectable 29.86 over the 520m journey. Looks an each way chance again here.

formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 6 length third but did run a respectable 29.86 over the 520m journey. Looks an each way chance again here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in and came together rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th on April 6 over 520m at Nowra behind Dynamic Drummer beaten 17 lengths (30.57) in a Grade 4/5. Placed two back at Nowra. Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th on April 6 over 520m at Nowra behind Dynamic Drummer beaten 17 lengths (30.57) in a Grade 4/5. Placed two back at Nowra. Solid claims this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 520m at this track beaten 14 lengths (30.58) behind Wonder I Do in a Grade 5 on April 5. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame two times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.
